_note: ghidra MCP daemon DECOMMISSIONED 2026-07-10 (native decompiler runaways ballooned to ~25GB and OOM'd the box). Use the static decompiled export docs/decompiled/all.c for pseudo-C, or open the .gpr in the Ghidra GUI. No daemon, no systemd service. The live-probe game MCP below is unaffected.

sotes_trainer._note: DURABLE LLM interface to the injected EN-SE trainer DLL (tools/sotes_trainer/trainer.c) over its :7777 JSON socket — the LLM counterpart to the human's ImGui UI. stdlib-only, clean python (no devshell banner). Endpoint via env OSS_TRAINER_REMOTE, else cutestation.soy:7777.
